_comment: Executable formal-lane exceptions policy (P1-FM-012). Canonical, machine-readable source of truth for any formal lane that is not yet a real, passing, discriminating, authoritative check. Enforced by tools/formal-exceptions-check (jq), invoked from scripts/check-verification-full.sh and just doctor-full. Keep in sync with docs/formal-exceptions.md prose and the lane tiers in verification/formal-full/README.md. JSON (not YAML) is used so jq can enforce it with no extra runtime deps.
_exceptions_note: Empty since 2026-06-21: the Verus and Lean4 proof lanes are now ALWAYS run and blocking in scripts/check-verification-full.sh (the LANE_REALITY_{VERUS,LEAN4}_NON_BLOCKING time-boxed exceptions were dropped once the generated proofs were confirmed to pass `verus --no-cheating` and `lake build`/`lake env lean`). New lanes that are not yet real/passing/authoritative go here with an allowed_until date.

scope_notes.reason: no overlay reducer/event in the runtime trace schema and neither Alloy nor P models overlay; Kani exercises ObligationSet::preserved_by against the real predicate, Verus carries the overlay-accepted-never-weakens lemma, and Lean4 carries the finite overlay theorem application (blocking, always-on)

no constraint-update reducer/event in the runtime trace schema and Alloy does not model it; P and Kani cover truth immutability, Verus carries the constraint-update-preserves-committed-truth lemma, and Lean4 carries the finite constraint-update future-only theorem application (blocking, always-on)
